message:
style(tests): rustfmt normalization across proptest suites

Apply consistent rustfmt formatting to nine proptest files. Changes are
purely cosmetic: alignment of trailing comments, line-breaking of long
.prop_map() closures, trailing comma adjustments, and whitespace
normalization. No test logic, strategies, or assertions are modified.

Files normalized:
- proptest_bocpd.rs: reflow strategy tuple alignment
- proptest_extensions.rs: reflow nested prop_oneof! arms
- proptest_kalman_watchdog.rs: trailing comma and alignment
- proptest_renderers.rs: reflow strategy chains and match arms
- proptest_sharding.rs: reflow prop_map closures
- proptest_vendored.rs: condense single-line prop_map closures
- proptest_webhook.rs: alignment in arb_webhook_config()
- proptest_dry_run.rs: minor whitespace
- proptest_wait.rs: minor whitespace

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-        "[a-z_]{5,20}",

+    )
 }
